title: Notifications to be sent ONLY on Weekdays
excerpt: I have a campaign board that I use to track a newsletter.  These is a specific column for “Target Completion Date” that tracks when I should have everything ready.  “Target Completion Date” is set relative to another col…

posts.author: palcocer (Peter Alcocer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a campaign board that I use to track a newsletter. These is a specific column for “Target Completion Date” that tracks when I should have everything ready. “Target Completion Date” is set relative to another column “Target Send Date”. Because the send date changes from month to month by a few calendar days, on occasion my reminder notification for “Target Completion Date” (which is sent 3 days prior) falls on a weekend.

I would like to create some form of logic/automation to have Monday confirm if the notification send date is on a weekend and if so, postpone the sending of the notification until the next weekday (i.e. the following Monday).

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Peter,

When you say “Target Completion Date is set relative to another column Target Send Date”, you mean it is set manually by the user or automatically? If automatically, how?

posts.author: palcocer (Peter Alcocer)
posts.cookedHtml: “Target Completion Date” is automated to be set 5 days prior to “Target Send Date”

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you create a third “notification date” and use business days for everything? That way nothing lands on a weekend, and you just notify ON the notification date.
